parsed_output.ticket: I was charged twice this month and your support team has not replied for five days. I am going to post this on social media if this is not fixed today.
parsed_output.justification: Explicit threat to post on social media about a billing error; escalates risk and demands immediate action.

parsed_output.ticket: The export button stopped working after your latest update. Our reporting team is blocked.
parsed_output.justification: Feature breakage blocks a core workflow, causing significant business impact.

parsed_output.ticket: Can you add approval workflows before invoices are submitted?
parsed_output.justification: A request for new functionality; not urgent but important for future improvements.

parsed_output.ticket: We need confirmation that our customer data is not being used to train your AI models.
parsed_output.justification: Privacy/data‑usage question that affects compliance and trust; requires prompt clarification.

parsed_output.ticket: My admin account is locked and the password reset email never arrives.
parsed_output.justification: Admin access is blocked, preventing management tasks; needs swift resolution.
